headline: Duke Energy: Grabbing A 6% Yield With The Baby Bonds
summary: Duke Energy maintains strong financials, supporting confidence in its ability to meet fixed income obligations. Read about the energy giant's baby bonds.

headline: Morgan Stanley Lifts Price Target on Duke Energy (DUK). Here is Why
summary: Duke Energy Corporation (NYSE:DUK) is included among the 12 Best Utility Stocks to Buy Now According to Hedge Funds.
